chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 274 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 17.10.2025. Mr. Raja Hansran Naurang, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Abdul Hafeez Daudani, Advocate for respondents No.5, 7 and 8. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State. = The applicant Allahdino is aggrieved by the orders dated 03.02.2025 wherein the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Shaheed Benazirabad had granted him police protection and he is before this Court in person. This Bench queried Allahdino why he was aggrieved to which he replied that the police authorities had not complied with the impugned order. Non compliance of the order passed by the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace is no ground for filing an application before this Court u/s 561-A Cr.P.C. No case is made out. Even otherwise this is a family dispute wherein Allahdino and his brother, do not see eye to eye. The instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands dismissed. JUDGE Tufail
